assertions.title: CLI QA UI source contract provides delivery-loop comparison fields

steps.expected: All tests pass with delivery-loop fields present
steps.observed: 16 tests passed, including 5 specific assertions for comparator-required fields
Test 'should include state field in successful response' passes - asserts state is 'planning'
Test 'should include checks array in successful response' passes - asserts checks is defined and non-empty
Test 'should include links in successful response' passes - asserts pullRequestUrl is present
Test 'should include freshness timestamp in successful response' passes - asserts updatedAtIso is '2024-01-15T10:30:00.000Z'

summary: Tested VAL-UI-007: CLI QA UI source contract provides delivery-loop comparison fields. All 16 tests passed. The UI source fetcher correctly includes comparator-required fields: state, checks, links (pullRequestUrl, statusCommentUrl, checkRunUrl), and freshness timestamp (updatedAtIso). The comparator engine is properly configured to use these fields for cross-source validation.
